rationale: The user asked DinoBrain to learn the same RAG methodology packet from another public OS. The content is safe to preserve as a methodology backlog, but URL anchors must remain unverified until fetched, chunked, and reviewed.
follow_up: Import the exact remaining upstream RAG URL anchors if the full 55-item list becomes available.
Fetch high-priority sources one at a time and create bounded reviewed source chunks.
Link concrete DinoBrain retrieval claims to source chunks before using them as verified support.
Run retrieval canaries after each source batch to verify that the anchors improve search behavior.
